decks.notes: This deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy centered around Elves, using cards like Fyndhorn Elves, Priest of Titania, and Wirewood Symbiote to generate mana and play creatures quickly. The deck has a primary focus on ramping up mana production to play powerful threats like Deranged Hermit and Masticore, while also utilizing cards like Survival of the Fittest to find key creatures. The inclusion of cards like Anger and Kamahl, Fist of Krosa provide additional ways to push through damage and close out games efficiently.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Mox Diamond and Weathered Wayfarer to play powerful land destruction spells like Armageddon. By destroying opponents' lands and generating mana with cards like Gemstone Mine, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large creatures like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose. The deck also includes cards like Sylvan Library to draw additional cards and maintain card advantage. Overall, this deck aims to establish early board control and maintain pressure on the opponent with its aggressive land destruction strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly building up a board of Elves to generate mana and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. It aims to ramp up mana production with cards like Fyndhorn Elves and Priest of Titania, while utilizing cards like Wirewood Symbiote to protect key creatures. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Masticore and Deranged Hermit to close out games quickly. The strategy revolves around efficiently using mana resources and leveraging the synergy between Elf creatures to maintain pressure on the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, as well as removal spells like Innocent Blood and Smother. The deck also aims to establish control through cards like Contamination and Engineered Plague, while generating card advantage with Skeletal Scrying. The deck also employs a lockout combo with Contamination and Nether Spirit, creating a difficult board state for the opponent to overcome. Additionally, the deck includes utility lands like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to further disrupt the opponent's resources.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through a combination of removal spells and disruptive cards like Duress and Destructive Flow, while utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore and Call of the Herd. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and win the game through overwhelming board presence and resource denial, utilizing cards like Mox Diamond and Sylvan Library to maintain card advantage and mana efficiency. The deck is designed to outvalue the opponent and control the pace of the game until victory is achieved.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board and lock down the opponent with the Stasis enchantment. By utilizing various counter spells and bounce effects, the player can continuously deny their opponent the ability to untap their permanents, effectively shutting down their ability to play spells or attack. With additional card draw and support cards, the deck aims to maintain the lock until they can find a win condition, such as decking the opponent with Brain Freeze or overwhelming them with a massive Upheaval.

This deck focuses on using the interaction between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly assemble a powerful win condition. By stifling the Dreadnought's triggered ability, players can cheat out a formidable 12/12 creature for a low cost. The deck also includes control elements such as Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo, while card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Impulse ensure consistency. The addition of Mishra's Factory provides a backup plan for attacking if the combo is disrupted. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the Dreadnought combo while controlling the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing mana ramp creatures and various utility creatures to control the board and outvalue opponents. It heavily relies on the powerful card, Survival of the Fittest, to tutor for key creatures and generate card advantage. The creatures in the deck provide removal, card draw, and ways to generate additional mana. With the ability to consistently churn out threats and answer opposing plays, the deck aims to grind out opponents and overwhelm them with cards and value.

The focus of this deck is to control the board state and disrupt opponent's strategies by countering spells and removing threats with cards like Nevinyrral's Disk and Powder Keg. The deck aims to draw cards and generate card advantage through Accumulated Knowledge and Fact or Fiction, while also controlling the opponent's resources with cards like Stifle and Parallax Tide. The deck also includes some land disruption with Dust Bowl and Quicksand, while utilizing creature lands like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave to pressure opponents.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through countering and bouncing opponent's cards while generating card advantage with Fact or Fiction. The deck utilizes cards like Black Vise and Propaganda to apply pressure and slow down the opponent's game plan. Parallax Tide is used to control the board and keep the opponent's resources limited. Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave provide additional threats while Rishadan Port and Wasteland disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to stall the game until it can establish control and eventually overwhelm the opponent with its resources.

The deck is centered around creating a powerful enchantress engine to generate card advantage and mana acceleration. By utilizing cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Mirri's Guile, the deck can quickly build up resources and find key combo pieces. Additionally, cards like Opalescence and Replenish provide win conditions by turning enchantments into creatures or returning them from the graveyard. The deck also includes disruption and protection elements like Swords to Plowshares, Seal of Cleansing, and Solitary Confinement to control the board and protect the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly search and put out powerful Goblin creatures like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. Additional removal and utility cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Naturalize provide some control options while the mana base helps to ensure consistent access to the deck's resources. Overall, the strategy revolves around swarming the opponent with Goblins to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by disrupting opponents' strategies through counterspells and removal spells while maintaining board presence with lands that can be used as threats. The deck aims to lock down the game with cards like Standstill and Parallax Tide, while also being able to control the board with creatures like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave. By focusing on controlling the game and slowly building up advantage, this deck can outvalue opponents and grind out wins over time.

The primary focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent through a combination of land destruction, direct damage spells, and creatures with utility abilities. By utilizing cards like Sphere of Resistance to slow down the opponent's game plan, along with cards like Incinerate and Lightning Bolt to deal with threats, the deck aims to establish board control and win through attrition. The land destruction package, consisting of cards like Pillage and Stone Rain, further disrupts the opponent's mana base while also providing tempo advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to establish a fast and aggressive board presence by playing efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer, Jackal Pup, and Mogg Fanatic. This is supported by burn spells like Incinerate and Lightning Bolt to clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Naturalize and Seal of Fire to handle opposing threats. The inclusion of cards like Call of the Herd and Sylvan Library provide card advantage and additional threats. The manabase is carefully balanced to support the aggressive game plan, with lands like Wasteland for disruption and Treetop Village for additional creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively deploy disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage and quickly ramp into powerful threats such as Terravore. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Armageddon while keeping card advantage with Sylvan Library. Additionally, the deck utilizes land destruction elements like Wasteland and Gemstone Mine to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The overall strategy is to apply early pressure, disrupt the opponent's game plan, and finish the game quickly with efficient threats.
